languages.text: "Злоумышленник успел тяжело ранить одного из специалистов и взять в заложники второго, требуя вашего появления. Блюстители контролируют ситуацию, но жизни досточтимых медикариев все еще под угрозой".

traits.locale_text: "Злоумышленник успел тяжело ранить одного из Хирургеонов Секундарис, и взять в заложники второго, требуя вашего появления. Блюстители контролируют ситуацию, но жизни досточтимых медикариев все еще под угрозой".

languages.text: "The perpetrator has severely wounded one of our prime experts and taken the other hostage, demanding Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence. The enforcers have the situation under control, but the lives of the esteemed medicae officers are still at risk."
languages.original_text: "Злоумышленник успел тяжело ранить одного из специалистов и взять в заложники второго, требуя вашего появления. Блюстители контролируют ситуацию, но жизни досточтимых медикариев все еще под угрозой".

languages.text: 「犯人は、セカンド・サージュンの一人を重傷にし、もう一人のセカンド・サージュンを人質にとり、貴方[mf|卿|女卿]の御臨席を要求しています。執行官たちは状況を掌握していますが、尊いセカンド・サージュンの命は依然として危険です」
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator has severely wounded one Chirurgeon Secundaris and taken the other hostage, demanding Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence. The enforcers have the situation under control, but the lives of the esteemed medicae officers are still at risk."

languages.text: "Fail, baş uzmanlarımızdan birini ağır yaralayıp bir diğerini rehin almış. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin huzurunu talep ediyor. İnfazcılar durumu kontrol altına aldı ama saygıdeğer sıhhiye subaylarının hayatları hâlâ tehlikede."
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator has severely wounded one of our prime experts and taken the other hostage, demanding Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence. The enforcers have the situation under control, but the lives of the esteemed medicae officers are still at risk."

traits.locale_text: "Fail, baş uzmanlarımızdan birini ağır yaralayıp bir diğerini rehin almış. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin huzurunu talep ediyor. İnfazcılar durumu kontrol altına aldı ama saygıdeğer sıhhiye subaylarının hayatları hâlâ tehlikede."

languages.text: “行凶者重伤了我们一名首席专家，并劫持了一名人质，要求大人您亲自现身。执法者已控制住局面，但两位尊贵医务官的性命仍危在旦夕。”
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator has severely wounded one of our prime experts and taken the other hostage, demanding Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence. The enforcers have the situation under control, but the lives of the esteemed medicae officers are still at risk."

traits.locale_text: “行凶者重伤了我们一名首席专家，并劫持了一名人质，要求大人您亲自现身。执法者已控制住局面，但两位尊贵医务官的性命仍危在旦夕。”

languages.text: "Der Täter hat einen unserer führenden Experten schwer verletzt und einen weiteren als Geisel genommen. Er will mit Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} sprechen. Die Enforcer haben die Situation unter Kontrolle, aber das Leben der geschätzten Medicae-Offiziere ist weiter in Gefahr."
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator has severely wounded one of our prime experts and taken the other hostage, demanding Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence. The enforcers have the situation under control, but the lives of the esteemed medicae officers are still at risk."

traits.locale_text: "Der Täter hat einen unserer führenden Experten schwer verletzt und einen weiteren als Geisel genommen. Er will mit Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} sprechen. Die Enforcer haben die Situation unter Kontrolle, aber das Leben der geschätzten Medicae-Offiziere ist weiter in Gefahr."

languages.text: « L'auteure de l'attentat a grièvement blessé l'un de nos plus éminents experts et retient à présent son collègue en otage. Elle exige que vous vous rendiez sur place immédiatement. Les prévôts ont la situation en main, mais la vie des honorables officiers de medicae est toujours menacée. »
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator has severely wounded one of our prime experts and taken the other hostage, demanding Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence. The enforcers have the situation under control, but the lives of the esteemed medicae officers are still at risk."

traits.locale_text: « L'auteure de l'attentat a grièvement blessé l'un de nos plus éminents experts et retient à présent son collègue en otage. Elle exige que vous vous rendiez sur place immédiatement. Les prévôts ont la situation en main, mais la vie des honorables officiers de medicae est toujours menacée. »

languages.text: «La persona responsable ha herido gravemente a uno de nuestros principales expertos y tiene al otro como rehén. Exige la presencia de mi{mf|lord|lady}. El personal de seguridad tiene controlada la situación, pero las vidas de los estimados oficiales de medicae aún corren peligro».
languages.original_text: "The perpetrator has severely wounded one of our prime experts and taken the other hostage, demanding Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s presence. The enforcers have the situation under control, but the lives of the esteemed medicae officers are still at risk."

traits.locale_text: «La persona responsable ha herido gravemente a uno de nuestros principales expertos y tiene al otro como rehén. Exige la presencia de mi{mf|lord|lady}. El personal de seguridad tiene controlada la situación, pero las vidas de los estimados oficiales de medicae aún corren peligro».
